interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get data for the homepage including featured content and quick summaries of saved items.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Articles List page for a given category.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Article category id, e.g., 'budget_money', 'venues', 'food_drink', 'other'.

interfaces.name: listArticles
interfaces.description: List articles for a category, with filters and sorting, for the Articles List page.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Article category id, e.g., 'budget_money', 'venues', 'food_drink', 'other'.

has_backup_indoor_space.description: If true, only return venue articles that mention a backup indoor space.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode, e.g., 'most_popular', 'newest', 'budget_breakdowns_first'.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for an article, including content and budget metadata.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to display.

can_add_to_budget_planner.description: True if this article supports the 'Add to budget plan' action.

budget_category_slug.description: Budget category to link to when adding to budget planner, e.g., 'catering'.

interfaces.name: saveArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save an article to the Reading List.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to save.

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Optional note about why the article was saved.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove a saved article from the Reading List.

parameters.name: savedArticleId
parameters.description: ID of the SavedArticle record to remove.

interfaces.name: getReadingList
interfaces.description: Get all articles in the Reading List for display and management.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Optional filter by article category, e.g., 'budget_money', 'venues', 'food_drink', 'other'.

interfaces.name: addArticleToBudgetPlanner
interfaces.description: Link an article to the Budget Planner under its relevant category (e.g., Catering).

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to link from the Article Detail page.

interfaces.name: getTimelineTemplateFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Timeline Templates List page.

interfaces.name: listTimelineTemplates
interfaces.description: List timeline templates for the Timeline Templates List page with filters and sorting.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode, e.g., 'most_popular', 'newest'.

interfaces.name: getTimelineTemplateDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details and schedule for a timeline template.

parameters.name: timelineTemplateId
parameters.description: ID of the TimelineTemplate to display.

interfaces.name: saveTimelineTemplateToPlanningBoard
interfaces.description: Save a timeline template to the Planning Board.

parameters.name: timelineTemplateId
parameters.description: ID of the timeline template to save.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes about how you plan to use this timeline.

interfaces.name: exportTimelineTemplate
interfaces.description: Prepare timeline template data for printing or exporting.

parameters.name: timelineTemplateId
parameters.description: ID of the timeline template to export.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Export format, e.g., 'print_view', 'pdf', 'csv'.

interfaces.name: getSeatingLayoutFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Seating Layouts List page.

interfaces.name: listSeatingLayouts
interfaces.description: List seating layout templates for the Seating & Floorplans page with filters and sorting.

require_mixed_tables.description: If true, only layouts where is_mixed_tables is true will be returned.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode, e.g., 'most_used', 'most_downloaded'.

interfaces.name: getSeatingLayoutDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a seating layout, including table shapes and counts.

parameters.name: seatingLayoutId
parameters.description: ID of the SeatingLayout to display.

interfaces.name: getSeatingLayoutSampleChart
interfaces.description: Get the detailed sample seating chart view for a layout.

parameters.name: seatingLayoutId
parameters.description: ID of the SeatingLayout whose chart should be displayed.

sample_chart_image.description: URL or identifier for the detailed chart view.

interfaces.name: saveSeatingLayoutToPlanningBoard
interfaces.description: Save a seating layout to the Planning Board.

parameters.name: seatingLayoutId
parameters.description: ID of the seating layout to save.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes about this layout.

interfaces.name: getPlanningBoardItems
interfaces.description: Get all items saved to the Planning Board, including timelines and seating layouts.

interfaces.name: removePlanningBoardItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the Planning Board.

parameters.name: planningBoardItemId
parameters.description: ID of the PlanningBoardItem to remove.

interfaces.name: getDIYProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the DIY Projects List page.

interfaces.name: listDIYProjects
interfaces.description: List DIY decor projects with filters for time, cost, difficulty, and style.

interfaces.name: getDIYProjectDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details and instructions for a DIY project.

parameters.name: diyProjectId
parameters.description: ID of the DIYProject to display.

interfaces.name: saveDIYProjectToMyProjects
interfaces.description: Add a DIY project to the My Projects list.

parameters.name: diyProjectId
parameters.description: ID of the DIY project to save.

interfaces.name: getMyProjects
interfaces.description: Get all DIY projects in the My Projects list.

interfaces.name: updateSavedProjectStatus
interfaces.description: Update the status of a saved DIY project (planned, in_progress, completed).

parameters.name: savedProjectId
parameters.description: ID of the SavedProject record to update.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status, e.g., 'planned', 'in_progress', 'completed'.

interfaces.name: removeSavedProject
interfaces.description: Remove a project from My Projects.

parameters.name: savedProjectId
parameters.description: ID of the SavedProject record to remove.

interfaces.name: getColorPaletteFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get tag and palette type options for the Color Palettes gallery.

interfaces.name: listColorPalettes
interfaces.description: List color palettes with tag and type filters for the Inspiration > Color Palettes page.

include_tags.description: Palette tags that must be present, e.g., ['Sage Green', 'Gold'].

interfaces.name: createMoodboard
interfaces.description: Create a new moodboard with the given name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the moodboard, e.g., 'Sage & Gold'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description for the moodboard.

interfaces.name: listMoodboards
interfaces.description: List all existing moodboards for the current user.

interfaces.name: getMoodboardDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a moodboard, including its palettes.

parameters.name: moodboardId
parameters.description: ID of the moodboard to view.

interfaces.name: addPaletteToMoodboard
interfaces.description: Add a color palette to a selected moodboard from the Color Palettes page.

parameters.name: moodboardId
parameters.description: ID of the moodboard to add the palette to.

parameters.name: paletteId
parameters.description: ID of the ColorPalette being added (comes from the clicked palette card).

interfaces.name: removePaletteFromMoodboard
interfaces.description: Remove a palette from a moodboard in the Moodboard Detail view.

parameters.name: moodboardId
parameters.description: ID of the moodboard.

parameters.name: paletteId
parameters.description: ID of the palette to remove.

interfaces.name: renameMoodboard
interfaces.description: Rename an existing moodboard.

parameters.name: moodboardId
parameters.description: ID of the moodboard to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New name for the moodboard.

interfaces.name: deleteMoodboard
interfaces.description: Delete a moodboard and all its palette associations.

parameters.name: moodboardId
parameters.description: ID of the moodboard to delete.

interfaces.name: reorderMoodboardPalettes
interfaces.description: Reorder palettes within a moodboard for presentation.

parameters.name: moodboardId
parameters.description: ID of the moodboard whose palettes are being reordered.

parameters.name: paletteOrder
parameters.description: Array of palette IDs in the new desired order.

interfaces.name: getChecklistFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available options for checklist timeline length, budget ranges, and guest count ranges.

interfaces.name: generateChecklist
interfaces.description: Generate a customized checklist based on timeline length, budget, and guest count.

parameters.name: timeline_months
parameters.description: Planning timeline length in months, e.g., 6.

parameters.name: budget_option_key
parameters.description: Key from getChecklistFilterOptions.budget_options.key, e.g., 'under_15000'.

parameters.name: guest_count_range_key
parameters.description: Key from getChecklistFilterOptions.guest_count_ranges.key, e.g., '80_120_guests'.

current_section_name.description: Section considered 'This Month' for display purposes.

interfaces.name: addChecklistTasksToToDos
interfaces.description: Add one or more checklist task templates to the central My To-Dos list.

parameters.name: checklistTaskTemplateIds
parameters.description: IDs of ChecklistTaskTemplate items to add.

interfaces.name: getToDosList
interfaces.description: Get all tasks in the user's My To-Dos list.

interfaces.name: updateToDoStatus
interfaces.description: Mark a to-do as complete or pending.

parameters.name: toDoId
parameters.description: ID of the ToDo to update.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status, 'pending' or 'completed'.

interfaces.name: updateToDoDetails
interfaces.description: Update due date or notes for a to-do item.

parameters.name: toDoId
parameters.description: ID of the ToDo to update.

parameters.name: due_date
parameters.description: New due date in ISO-8601 format, or null to clear.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Updated notes for this task.

interfaces.name: removeToDo
interfaces.description: Remove a to-do from the My To-Dos list.

parameters.name: toDoId
parameters.description: ID of the ToDo to remove.

interfaces.name: getBudgetPlannerOverview
interfaces.description: Get a full view of the Budget Planner including category allocations and linked articles.

interfaces.name: updateBudgetCategoryAllocation
interfaces.description: Update planned or actual amounts for a budget category.

parameters.name: category_slug
parameters.description: Slug of the budget category, e.g., 'catering', 'venue'.

parameters.name: planned_amount
parameters.description: New planned amount for this category.

parameters.name: actual_amount
parameters.description: New actual amount for this category.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Notes about this category's budget.

interfaces.name: removeBudgetArticleLink
interfaces.description: Remove a linked article from a budget category in the Budget Planner.

parameters.name: budgetArticleLinkId
parameters.description: ID of the BudgetArticleLink to remove.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateUserDataStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single-user data store (reading list, planning board, moodboards, etc.) from local storage or another persistence layer.

helperFunctions.name: _saveUserDataStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist the updated single-user data store back to local storage or another persistence layer.

helperFunctions.name: _applyArticleFiltersAndSorting
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter and sort articles according to the parameters passed to listArticles.

helperFunctions.name: _applyTemplateFiltersAndSorting
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter and sort TimelineTemplate and SeatingLayout entities according to listTimelineTemplates and listSeatingLayouts filters.

helperFunctions.name: _generateChecklistInstance
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to select an appropriate ChecklistTemplate and its ChecklistTaskTemplate items based on timeline, budget, and guest count parameters.
